sourceDesc.bibl: Automated transcription of Humboldt – Folio 29v by Alexander von Humboldt, produced by the Humboldt – The Inaccurate Edition pipeline.

div.p:
Flora.
Dipsacus fullonum 3.
sylvestris 3. Laciniatus 3.
Hypnum crista castrensis 5.
Lichen tartareus. 5.
calcareus 5.
capperatus 5
Verrucaria pertusa 5.
Saxifraga granulata 12.
tridactylites 12.
Alchemilla vulgaris 12.
Viola montana 12.
Polypodium vulgare 12.
Gentiana amarella 12.
Arenaria saxatilis 13.
Dianthus prolifer 16.
